title: address_part uses stringly-typed part param instead of enum
description: message.rs:60 and evaluator.rs:326-341: address_part() takes part: &str with legal values "localpart", "domain", "all". extract_address_part returns &'static str for the same. A 3-variant enum (AddressPart { LocalPart, Domain, All }) makes invalid states unrepresentable, documents the contract at the call site, and removes the match on string literals in both address_part and extract_address_part.
